span.p: length/byteOffset derive from the view: length = view->length, byteOffset = shape->offset * elem_size. No cached data pointer.

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: data_cap==0 means native-backed. First user property write upgrades to a real shape and stows the native pointer under ta / ab / dv.
